primary_claim: Independent public fibroblast datasets provide bounded external reproducibility and descriptive disease-context biological-utility evidence for FibroDynMix state compositions and transfer diagnostics.
claim_boundary: External public-data validation using bounded sampled/capped outputs. GSE167339 Human3 hash groups support donor robustness only; GSE156326/GSE181316 module contrasts are descriptive small-sample pseudobulk effects and do not pass FDR significance.
